name: Skyler Jackson
about: 3 years in contemporary retail at UNIQLO and Abercrombie & Fitch SoHo. Trend-aware and connects with younger shoppers. Retailers love her energy during new collection launches.
interviewTranscript: A little bit about me is that I do have six years experience in retail across the board. To specify, I do have about a year experience in managerial sales experience in cosmetics retail, as well as two and a half plus years in cosmetic sales associate roles. I also have about a year experience in client advisory associate roles for the fashion industry on the sales side, and then a little bit else within the six years of my experience is the year and a half of managerial experience in the back of the house of cosmetic industries as well as retail fashion industries. I do also have about half a year of operation associate experience. I would love to expand my experience in the fashion retail industry being that I do have my experience started out there. A time where I went above and beyond for our clients—I would have to say definitely is with my previous role at Macy's. I did work in the cosmetic industry and was recognized by an event that we had hosted and that one was really successful. I do feel on the sales end, I do have a lot of successful experiences.
